$data = json_decode(<<<'JSON'

JSON, true);
foreach ($data as $d) {
  try {
    $p = new WC_Product_Simple();
    $p->set_name($d['name']); $p->set_slug($d['slug']); $p->set_sku($d['sku']);
    $p->set_regular_price($d['regular']); if(!empty($d['sale'])){ $p->set_sale_price($d['sale']); }
    $p->set_manage_stock(true); $p->set_stock_quantity(intval($d['stock']));
    $p->set_stock_status(intval($d['stock'])>0?'instock':'outofstock');
    $p->set_status('publish'); $p->set_catalog_visibility('visible'); $p->set_category_ids(array($cat_id));
    $id = $p->save();
    update_post_meta($id,'_wc_average_rating',$d['rating']); update_post_meta($id,'_wc_review_count',$d['count']);
    foreach($d['specs'] as $k=>$v){ update_post_meta($id,$k,$v); }
    foreach($d['rich'] as $k=>$v){ update_post_meta($id,$k, is_string($v)?$v: wp_slash(wp_json_encode($v))); }
  } catch (Exception $e) { echo "ERR ".$e->getMessage(); }
}
global $wpdb;

echo "DZ_READY ".count($data);
